revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{template shortcut|Bg}} == Usage == {{Background color||}} [[:en:Web colors|Web colors]] provides a list of colors which can be used. Simple colors, like black, blue, red, green, etc. can just be spelled out. Alternatively, colors can be specified using either RGB or hex notation. == Examples == * {{tlx|Background color|red|Hello, world!}} results in {{Background color|red|Hello, world!}} * {{tlx|Background color|#00F000|Hello, world!}} results in {{Background color|#00F000|Hello, world!}} == Tracking category == * {{clc|Pages using Template:Background color with invalid color combination}} == Supporting template == * {{tl|Ensure AAA contrast ratio}} == See also == * {{tl|Color}} – sets text color only * {{tl|Font color}} – sets both text and background color * {{tl|coltit}} — colored table header cell * {{tl|Color contrast ratio}} * {{tl|Hilite}} – sets background color, with an optional expiry date * {{tl|Resize}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Text color templates]] [[Category:Color templates]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{template shortcut|Bg}} == Usage == {{Background color||}} [[:en:Web colors|Web colors]] provides a list of colors which can be used. Simple colors, like black, blue, red, green, etc. can just be spelled out. Alternatively, colors can be specified using either RGB or hex notation. == Examples == * {{tlx|Background color|red|Hello, world!}} results in {{Background color|red|Hello, world!}} * {{tlx|Background color|#00F000|Hello, world!}} results in {{Background color|#00F000|Hello, world!}} == Tracking category == * {{clc|Pages using Template:Background color with invalid color combination}} == Supporting template == * {{tl|Ensure AAA contrast ratio}} == See also == * {{tl|Color}} – sets text color only * {{tl|Font color}} – sets both text and background color * {{tl|coltit}} — colored table header cell * {{tl|Color contrast ratio}} * {{tl|Hilite}} – sets background color, with an optional expiry date * {{tl|Resize}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Text color templates]] [[Category:Color templates]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Background_color%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{template shortcut|Bg}} == Usage == {{Background color||}} [[:en:Web colors|Web colors]] provides a list of colors which can be used. Simple colors, like black, blue, red, green, etc. can just be spelled out. Alternatively, colors can be specified using either RGB or hex notation. == Examples == * {{tlx|Background color|red|Hello, world!}} results in {{Background color|red|Hello, world!}} * {{tlx|Background color|#00F000|Hello, world!}} results in {{Background color|#00F000|Hello, world!}} == Tracking category == * {{clc|Pages using Template:Background color with invalid color combination}} == Supporting template == * {{tl|Ensure AAA contrast ratio}} == See also == * {{tl|Color}} – sets text color only * {{tl|Font color}} – sets both text and background color * {{tl|coltit}} — colored table header cell * {{tl|Color contrast ratio}} * {{tl|Hilite}} – sets background color, with an optional expiry date * {{tl|Resize}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Text color templates]] [[Category:Color templates]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
